name: ROBERT HALF INC.
headquarters: Menlo Park and San Ramon, California
summary: Robert Half Inc. provides specialized talent solutions and business consulting services under the Robert Half and Protiviti brands. Services include contract and permanent placement of professionals in finance and accounting, technology, marketing and creative, legal, and administrative fields. Protiviti, a wholly owned subsidiary, offers consulting and managed solutions in regulatory compliance, finance, technology, operations, data, risk, and internal audit across more than 25 countries.
